vault.heading: Access your private planning
vault.subtitle: Your tasks stay local, private, and encrypted.
vault.willCreate: A new vault will be created at this location.
vault.instruction: Choose an existing vault or create a new one to begin.
vault.passwordRequired: Enter a password to create the vault.

overdue: Pending tasks whose due time has passed.
week: Tasks due in the next few days.
noDate: Open tasks without a due date.

overdue.title: Overdue
overdue.subtitle: Pending tasks whose due time has passed.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.subtitle: Pending tasks with a notification configured.

overdue: Reminders that have passed and still need attention.
week: Reminders scheduled for the next few days.

archived.title: Archived
archived.subtitle: Completed tasks preserved outside your working views.
archived.emptyMessage: Tasks archived automatically or manually will appear here.

task.title: Title
task.titlePlaceholder: What needs to be done? Use + to add tags

search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Find tasks by title or note content.
search.promptTitle: What do you need to find?
search.prompt: Type a word or use filters to search your vault.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Local preferences and secure Praxis status.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the language used throughout the application.
settings.appearanceDescription: Choose matte paper for bright rooms or inverted ink for low light.
settings.notificationsDescription: Allow pending task reminders to display notifications.
settings.badge: Show badge on the app icon
settings.badgeDescription: Display the pending task count on the application icon when available.
settings.startWindowsDescription: Open Praxis automatically when Windows starts.
settings.startMinimizedDescription: Keep Praxis discreet when it starts automatically.
settings.minimizeTrayDescription: Closing the unlocked window keeps Praxis running in the background.
settings.updatesDescription: Download signed releases published on GitHub.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Create reusable contexts. Name and color changes appear immediately on related tasks.
tags.empty: No tags yet. Praxis can also create a tag when you type + in a task title.

help.title: How to use Praxis
help.intro: A concise guide to capture what matters, receive the right reminder, and finish the day without forgotten tasks.
help.supportTitle: Built with care, supported by people who believe in it
help.supportDescription: Meet the person behind Praxis and, if it makes sense to you, help keep the project moving forward.

support.intro1: Praxis is independently created and maintained by {name}, with special attention to privacy, performance, and the details that make daily use calmer.
support.intro2: If Praxis helps you remember what matters, a voluntary contribution supports development, Windows testing, and the project’s continuity. Praxis will continue to work normally without a donation.
support.internationalDescription: Support Praxis through Buy Me a Coffee in your system browser.
support.openError: The browser could not be opened.
support.pixDescription: Any amount helps keep development active.
support.copyError: Windows did not allow the key to be copied. Try again.
support.pixHint: Scan the QR code or copy the key. You choose the amount.
support.qrAlt: Pix QR code to support Praxis development

timeline.label: Task timeline
timeline.empty: No events recorded for this task.
timeline.name: Name
